CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT, data_dict RDF_LITERAL);
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key1') AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key2') AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key3', 'default_value') AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key4', 0) AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key4') AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 3;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key2', 'not_found') AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key5', null) AS value FROM test_dict WHERE id = 3;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key1') AS value FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key2', 100) AS value FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS subquery;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key3') AS value FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict) AS subquery WHERE id = 3;
SELECT dict_get(t.data_dict, 'key2') AS value FROM test_dict t INNER JOIN test_dict t2 ON t.id = t2.id WHERE t.id = 1;
SELECT dict_get(data_dict, 'key1') AS value FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict ORDER BY id LIMIT 1) AS subquery;
